name: SocialPilot
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What SocialPilot Does

Social Pilot is a well-known social media marketing tool with an extensive customer base, including companies like Amazon, Samsung, and Vodafone. SocialPilot has white-label features to match your brand. 

Social Pilot focuses on social media management and marketing and may lack a broader range of features like other platforms.

Key Features

Key features that can be highlighted for SocialPilot are: 

  • White-Label Features:some text
    • The tool reflects your brand and identity (logo, URL, email, chat support, and analytics and reports). 
    • Customized dashboards.  
    • Concierge Setup: Personalized setup.
  • Schedule and automate posts for social media platforms. 
  • Automated content idea generation and incorporation of RSS feeds.
  • Social media management with many automated features.

Benefits of SocialPilot

The benefits of SocialPilot are as follows: 

  • White Label Benefits:some text
    • Rebrand the platform, making it appear as your solution.
    • White-labeling features include customized URLs, email, chat support, reports, and analytics.
    • Manage an unlimited number of clients under your brand.
  • Social media management 
  • Time management and automated functions such as: some text
    • Automated content collection and posting
    • Automated analytics and reports 
  • Access via the web, mobile, and browser extension: 24/7   

Pricing

Users can opt for one of four plans available with Social Pilot: 

  • Professional: USD 25.5/monthsome text
    • One user & ten social media accounts  
  • Small Team: USD 42.5/month  some text
    • Three users & 20 social media accounts  
  • Agency:  USD 85/month  some text
    • Six users & 30 social media accounts 
  • Agency +: USD 170/monthsome text
    • Unlimited users 

Pros

✅Posting Efficiency

✅Social Media Management    

✅User Friendly

Cons

🚫Lacks a Broader Range of Features 

🚫Minor Glitches Plague the Platform

🚫Linking Issues
